name: Tim Tebow
title: Former NFL Quarterback & Baseball Player
bio: American former professional football and baseball player, Heisman Trophy winner, and two-time BCS National Champion with the University of Florida. Now a sports analyst, author, and philanthropist.
faith: One of the most outspoken Christian athletes in modern sports. Famous for 'Tebowing' (kneeling in prayer on the field) and wearing Bible verses on his eye black. Founded the Tim Tebow Foundation, which hosts 'Night to Shine' proms for people with special needs worldwide.
